reviewer.evidencePolicy: Satisfy only reporting claims covered by checked-in packet and CLI tests; reclassify the command-observation writer claim instead of overclaiming unsupported execution behavior.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The reporting contract describes a conditional product-owned report-input writer, while the active-run contract currently says report-input.json is operator/agent assembled and evaluate fixture writes only eval artifacts.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: No current implementation evidence was found that Cautilus itself writes report-input commandObservations while executing adapter-defined report mode commands.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Either implement the product-owned report-input command observation writer or realign reporting.md with the current active-run boundary before attaching deterministic proof.
unresolvedQuestions: Should evaluate fixture ever assemble report-input.json, or should reporting.md keep this as a future conditional only?

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names a deterministic explicit-only telemetry rule, covered by report packet tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Report packet tests verify cost is not inferred from command observations and is preserved only from explicit mode telemetry.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep cost fields explicit-only when changing report telemetry aggregation or command observation handling.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names explicit cache-token telemetry preservation, covered by mode and scenario telemetry tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Report and scenario telemetry tests verify cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, cached_input_tokens, and budget-attribution fields are preserved only from structured telemetry.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep cache-token breakdown fields as structured telemetry fields, not prose-derived report decoration.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names review-variant blocked packet shape, covered by CLI smoke and reason classification tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: CLI review variant tests verify blocked variant outputs carry product-owned blocked status, reasonCodes, concrete reason text, synthesized blocker findings, and partial-success handling.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep blocked review variants machine-readable when adding executor variants or failure classifiers.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names report packet scenario-telemetry lifting for mode runs, covered by report builder tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Report builder tests verify held-out and full-gate mode runs preserve scenarioTelemetrySummary, mode telemetry, and overall report telemetry from explicit scenario result packets.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep scenario-level telemetry in mode summaries and report telemetry when changing report build inputs or schemas.
